plugins.name: Shimmer Delay
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Ethereal delay with pitch shifting and reverb. Creates a shimmering, angelic trail behind every note.

plugins.name: Lo-Fi Crunch
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Bit-crushing and vinyl warmth. Degrades your signal into something beautifully broken.

plugins.name: Space Echo
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Tape-style echo with wow and flutter. Sends your sound drifting into deep space.

plugins.name: Vowel Filter
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Formant filter that shapes your signal through vocal vowel sounds. Talk through your synth.

plugins.name: Glitch Machine
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Stutter, chop, and mangle. Randomized buffer repeats that fracture time into sharp-edged rhythm.

plugins.name: Ambient Wash
plugins.author: Strange Arcade
plugins.description: Slow attack pad layer with long reverb tail. Turns any note into an infinite drone landscape.
